'''Totolaya''' was a hostage taken by the [[Yevetha]] during the attack on the [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] colony [[Doornik-319]]. Along with the other hostages taken during the [[Yevethan Purge]], Totolaya was forced to record a message begging the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] not to fire on Yevethan ships carrying prisoners. The Yevetha played the messages during the [[Battle of Doornik-319]], causing hesitation from the New Republic ships and forcing them to withdraw.
